title: UFO Update: NASA Astronaut Reveals Planned Test for Extraterrestrial Life
description: A NASA astronaut preparing for a grueling eight-month stint in orbit reveals a plan to test for extraterrestrial life.

title: Here’s where to read all the UFO documents released by the CIA
description: Explore the CIA’s UFO files on The Black Vault—searchable PDFs, ZIP archives, and up‐to‐date UAP releases in one reliable source. The post Here’s where to read all the UFO documents released by the CIA appeared first on Film Daily .

title: Eddy Cue & Jerry Bruckheimer “Hopeful” On ‘F1: The Movie’ Sequel, Latter Teases UFO Thriller — Cannes Lions
description: Apple’s Eddy Cue and Jerry Bruckheimer are ready to get the team back on the track. Speaking at Cannes Lions today, Cue said he was “hopeful” for a sequel to the Brad Pitt-starring sports movie alongside Hollywood producer Jerry Bruckheimer, who joined him for the fireside chat. As of right now, there’s no official greenlight [...]

title: Government files detail 1958 Detroit UFO report
description: The DOW says the federal government is unable to confirm the nature of the observed phenomena, due to the lack of sufficient data.

title: Buckhannon's UFO Day celebration set for this Saturday
description: BUCKHANNON, W.Va. — Buckhannon is preparing for a UFO Day event this Saturday, June 27, from noon to 6 p.m. on Main Street.
